notes: Based on live Happy Garden / Taman Gembira terrace-house asking listings and recent subsale evidence, the market is clustering around roughly RM490–RM530 psf on a built-up basis, with a few higher-renovation outliers above RM630 psf. For the subject’s 1,711 sqft built-up, that points to about RM0.90m as a fair current value. I would treat ~RM0.82m as a practical lower bound for a basic/intermediate unit and ~RM1.05m as a realistic upper bound for a well-renovated or better-positioned unit. Happy Garden is sometimes grouped with Taman Gembira / Kuchai Lama / OUG / Sri Petaling in portal data, so I kept comparables within that same neighborhood cluster and excluded rentals.
